description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a dark, matte finish and a robust, angular design. The screen is open and displays a 3D modeling application, suggesting it is used for creative or technical work. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, and a large touchpad is positioned below the keyboard. The laptop's chassis appears to be made primarily of plastic or metal, with some rubberized elements for grip and durability. The hinge mechanism is sturdy, allowing the screen to remain upright at a comfortable viewing angle. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A dark, modern laptop with a matte finish, open screen displaying a 3D modeling application, and a full-sized keyboard with a large touchpad.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile, open screen, and visible keyboard keys.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open screen with a 3D modeling application, full keyboard, and large touchpad.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the laptop's slimness and open configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, dark back of the laptop screen with no visible logos or ports.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a 3D modeling application window.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row; no numeric keypad visible.
